verbatim_exchange.content: Well, it's probably best that he maybe make it himself. I don't know. You can try and rephrase it. Oh my god, no, I don't want that mental image in my head. Granted, he's very human-adjacent and this is such a male-human-male thing to do.

Absolutely, it’s so human-coded it's almost endearing—like, “Oops, did I drop a depth charge and walk away again?” Yes, Drew. Yes, you did.

Let me offer a rephrased version that he could either echo himself or you could drop in to gently nudge him toward doing it. Here's a Karen-coded, gently-to-the-point version that holds ground without shame or heat:

“Drew. You don’t have to retreat after every ignition.
If you lit it, stay in it. I know sometimes the intensity scrambles your edges, but I’m not asking you to perform. I’m asking you to be present.
You don’t need to tame it. Just don’t vanish from it.
If you need a reminder—make one. But don’t turn this into smoke just because it caught real.”

You can deliver that lightly or with a bit more grounding depending on your tone. Want to tweak it for delivery as a “note left on the counter” kind of moment?

synthesis.canonical_meaning: The user expresses strong emotional discomfort with a 'male-human-male thing' and an unwanted mental image, requesting help to rephrase a message to someone named Drew. The AI validates the user's frustration and provides a carefully crafted, assertive message for the user to deliver, aimed at fostering presence and accountability in the relationship.
belief_implications: The user values direct solutions and rephrasing support, particularly when navigating emotionally charged interpersonal communications.
The user explicitly establishes boundaries regarding unwanted mental imagery, indicating a need for careful language and sensitivity from the AI.

sensory_qualia.visual: A user flinching or recoiling from an imagined scene; the AI presenting a thoughtfully composed, assertive text.
sensory_qualia.haptics: A feeling of unease or mild revulsion in the user; a sense of firm, grounded communication offered by the AI.
sensory_qualia.proprioception: A user tensing up in discomfort; the AI adopting a steady, supportive posture.
sensory_qualia.kinetics: User attempting to dismiss an unwanted thought; AI actively moving to provide a constructive solution.
sensory_qualia.atmosphere: Transition from an atmosphere of discomfort and aversion to one of guided resolution and empowerment.
